reply_subject: Re: Quick question about your telehealth rollout
reply_body: Hi — yes we're actively looking at solutions in this space. Can you send over some more info? Specifically interested in how you handle HIPAA compliance. Happy to chat next week.
Thanks for reaching out but we just signed a 2-year contract with a competitor last month. Maybe circle back in 2027.
Not the right person for this. You should talk to our VP of Operations, James Park (james.park@greenwaylogistics.com). He handles all vendor decisions.
Please remove me from your mailing list.
This is actually really timely. We just lost our previous vendor and need to make a decision by end of March. Can we set up a call this week? I'll loop in our CTO.
